Features.title: SEED Tech & Features
Features.description: Combining latest camera technologies and AI to offer you a complete sports experience elevating your game.

cameras4k.title: 4K Cameras in Every Court
cameras4k.desc: High precision cameras installed in strategic angles recording every moment of your match with extreme accuracy.

aiAnalysis.title: Instant AI Analysis
aiAnalysis.desc: Advanced AI system analyzes your performance immediately after match and provides detailed reports and recommendations.

shotTracking.title: Shot & Ball Tracking
shotTracking.desc: Precise tracking for ball path, speed, and rebound area, with analysis for every forehand and backhand.

performance.title: Physical Performance Stats
performance.desc: Measuring distance covered, movement speed, and coverage areas in court during match.

booking.title: Fast & Easy Booking
booking.desc: Book your favorite court in seconds through the app with advance booking up to a week.

smartApp.title: Integrated Smart App
smartApp.desc: Easy-to-use app combining booking, analysis, videos, and stats in one place.

challenges.title: Challenges & Competitions
challenges.desc: Participate in tournaments and challenges with other players and compare stats with community.

progress.title: Progress Tracking
progress.desc: Monitor your level evolution over time through graphs and historical stats.

AISection.title: What does AI analyze?
AISection.description: Our smart system analyzes every aspect of your game to provide precise insights helping you evolve.

movement.title: Movement Analysis
movement.desc: Track your movement in court: Distance covered, Response speed.

recommendations.title: Smart Recommendations
recommendations.desc: Customized recommendations to improve weaknesses and boost strengths.

progress.title: Progress Tracking
progress.desc: Monitor your level evolution over time with detailed stats.

shot.title: Shot Analysis
shot.desc: Precise analysis for every shot: Speed, Spin, Angle, Rebound area.
